drafts.circular_summary: RBI regulatory update — Meeting Schedule of the Monetary Policy Committee for 2026-2027.
actions: Submit SOFTEX form for each export invoice to the bank within 30 days — required as Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd. is a software exporter under FEMA
Reconcile shipping documents, invoices, bank realisation details, and SOFTEX declarations before closure of the reporting cycle
Track pending export realisations, overdue foreign receivables, and FEMA follow-up items separately from GST or direct tax matters
applicable_sections: Section 45ZI of Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934
drafts.email_subject: Compliance Advisory: Meeting Schedule of the Monetary Policy Committee for 2026-2027
drafts.email_body:
{
  "subject": "Compliance Advisory: FEMA Requirements for Software Exporters",
  "body": "Dear Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd. Team,

As a software exporter under the Foreign Exchange Management Act (FEMA), Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd. is required to comply with specific regulations to ensure seamless export operations. This advisory is to bring to your attention the necessary actions to be taken to maintain compliance.

Please note the following actions to be completed by the deadline:

1. Submit SOFTEX form for each export invoice to the bank within 30 days.
2. Reconcile shipping documents, invoices, bank realisation details, and SOFTEX declarations before closure of the reporting cycle.
3. Track pending export realisations, overdue foreign receivables, and FEMA follow-up items separately from GST or direct tax matters.

The deadline for completion of these actions is **28th April 2026**. Although the risk level is medium, it is essential to adhere to these requirements to avoid any potential issues.

If you require any assistance or clarification on these requirements, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team

Source Reference:
Circular Title : Meeting Schedule of the Monetary Policy Committee for 2026-2027
Regulator      : RBI
Circular No.   : Refer official portal
Published Date : Recent
Source URL     : https://rbidocs.rbi.org.in/rdocs/PressRelease/PDFs/PR230645E88B9147F84BF8ABAD12BC716CA440.PDF"
drafts.internal_notes: CA notes — deadline was estimated, cross-checks needed for FEMA compliance

actions: Submit SOFTEX form for each export invoice to HDFC Bank Fort Branch within 30 days — required as Arvind Textiles is a goods exporter under FEMA
Track pending export realisations, overdue foreign receivables, and FEMA follow-up items separately from GST or direct tax matters
Reconcile shipping documents, invoices, bank realisation details, and SOFTEX declarations before closure of the reporting cycle
Obtain corrected declarations where transaction values, invoice references, or remittance details do not match prior submissions
applicable_sections: Section 45ZI of Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934
drafts.email_subject: Compliance Advisory: Meeting Schedule of the Monetary Policy Committee for 2026-2027
drafts.email_body:
{
  "subject": "Compliance Advisory: FEMA Requirements for Export Transactions - Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd.",
  "body": "Dear Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd. Team,

As a goods exporter under FEMA, Arvind Textiles Pvt. Ltd. is required to comply with the regulations outlined in the recent RBI circular. Specifically, this applies to your company as you engage in export transactions, which necessitate adherence to FEMA guidelines.

To ensure compliance, we recommend the following actions:

1. Submit SOFTEX form for each export invoice to HDFC Bank Fort Branch within 30 days.
2. Track pending export realisations, overdue foreign receivables, and FEMA follow-up items separately from GST or direct tax matters.
3. Reconcile shipping documents, invoices, bank realisation details, and SOFTEX declarations before closure of the reporting cycle.
4. Obtain corrected declarations where transaction values, invoice references, or remittance details do not match prior submissions.

Please note that the deadline for completing these actions is **2026-04-28**. Although the risk level is classified as medium, we recommend prompt attention to avoid any potential issues.

If you require assistance or have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team

Source Reference:
Circular Title : Meeting Schedule of the Monetary Policy Committee for 2026-2027
Regulator      : RBI
Source URL     : https://rbidocs.rbi.org.in/rdocs/PressRelease/PDFs/PR230645E88B9147F84BF8ABAD12BC716CA440.PDF
"
drafts.internal_notes: CA notes — deadline was estimated, cross-checks needed for specific invoice count and oldest invoice date

actions: Submit NBS-9 return to RBI by 2026-04-07 — penalty for delayed filing
Update KYC records for all borrowers and depositors at prescribed periodicity — ensure compliance with RBI directions
applicable_sections: Section 45ZI of Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934
drafts.email_subject: Compliance Advisory: Meeting Schedule of the Monetary Policy Committee for 2026-2027
drafts.email_body:
{
  "subject": "Compliance Advisory: RBI Circular - Meeting Schedule of the Monetary Policy Committee for 2026-2027",
  "body": "Dear Sunrise Finserv NBFC Ltd. Team,

This advisory is specifically applicable to your NBFC as it is subject to RBI regulations. As a non-banking financial company, you are required to comply with RBI directions and submit returns and update KYC records as per the prescribed periodicity.

Please take note of the following actions:

1. Submit NBS-9 return to RBI by 2026-04-07 to avoid penalty for delayed filing.
2. Update KYC records for all borrowers and depositors at prescribed periodicity to ensure compliance with RBI directions.

The deadline for these actions is **2026-04-07**. Failure to comply may result in RBI compliance action, which could impact your license.

We are here to assist you in ensuring compliance with RBI regulations. If you have any questions or require assistance, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Compliance Advisory Team

Source Reference:
Circular Title : Meeting Schedule of the Monetary Policy Committee for 2026-2027
Regulator      : RBI
Circular No.   : Refer official portal
Published Date : Recent
Source URL     : https://rbidocs.rbi.org.in/rdocs/PressRelease/PDFs/PR230645E88B9147F84BF8ABAD12BC716CA440.PDF
"
